name: The Credit Repair
description_short: Credit repair company serving NYC tri-state area that disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and offers lending assistance for major purchases.
description_long:
The Credit Repair (operating as Credit Repair Plus based on testimonials) is a credit repair service primarily serving the New York City metropolitan area, including Brooklyn, Staten Island, and Manhattan. The company operates from the phone number 718-475-2087 and maintains a web presence at savemycreditreport.com.

The company offers credit restoration services centered on disputing inaccurate and negative items from credit reports. Their stated process includes: free credit report evaluation across all three bureaus (TransUnion, Experian, Equifax), customized credit repair plans developed in accordance with FCRA, HIPAA, FCBA and other consumer protection laws, dispute letter submission to credit reporting agencies, and online progress tracking for clients. They also advertise lending partnership assistance for home and car purchases.

The company distinguishes itself through its claimed focus on leveraging consumer rights to challenge inaccurate items, and offering buying assistance through lending partners. They provide free initial consultations and online client account access for monitoring dispute progress. Testimonials highlight success with collections accounts, repossessions, late payments, judgments, tax liens, and inquiry removal.

However, the website contains several red flags: inconsistent branding (references both "Credit Repair" and "Credit Repair Plus"), blog content appears to be Lorem Ipsum placeholder text rather than genuine credit education, and the affiliate section suggests a revenue model that may involve referral commissions. No information is provided about pricing, timeline guarantees, or regulatory compliance credentials. The company makes results-based claims without substantiating how their process differs from consumer self-dispute rights available free through the bureaus.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers completely free credit report evaluation and initial consultation
Pulls credit reports from all three bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) if clients don't have them
Provides online client portal with login access to monitor dispute progress in real-time
Explicitly references compliance with FCRA, HIPAA, and FCBA consumer protection laws
Offers additional buying assistance through lending partners for major purchases
Targets multiple dispute categories including collections, repossessions, late payments, judgments, tax liens, and inquiries
Provides credit education programs and webinars to clients
cons: Website contains Lorem Ipsum placeholder text in blog section, suggesting poor content maintenance and professionalism concerns
No pricing information disclosed—costs and payment structure completely opaque
Inconsistent branding (company named both 'The Credit Repair' and 'Credit Repair Plus' across materials) raises legitimacy questions
No timeline guarantees provided for dispute resolution or credit improvement results
Testimonials lack verifiable details and some reference different company name, making authenticity difficult to assess
No information about company credentials, licensing, or regulatory registrations
best_for: NYC tri-state residents with inaccurate negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Consumers planning major purchases (home or auto) who need credit repair before applying for financing
Individuals with collections accounts, tax liens, or judgments seeking removal from credit reports
diagnosis: Best suited for NYC-area consumers with documentable errors on their credit reports who prefer professional dispute management over self-service. The main caveat is that pricing, guarantees, and company legitimacy cannot be verified from the website, and consumers have the legal right to dispute items themselves for free through the bureaus under the FCRA.
services: Free credit report evaluation across TransUnion, Experian, and Equifax
Credit report pull and retrieval if client doesn't have current reports
Dispute letter preparation and submission to credit bureaus
Dispute correspondence management and response handling
Online client portal with login for progress tracking
Lending partner connections for home and auto purchase assistance
Judgment and tax lien dispute assistance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
